rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.211 governs school epinephrine and respiratory distress medication prescriptions. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: A physician or person who has been delegated prescriptive authority under Chapter 157, Occupations Code, may prescribe epinephrine delivery systems or medication for respiratory distress in the name of a school district, open-enrollment charter school, or private school.
_note: No textual or operational relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this epinephrine/respiratory distress statute.
